warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Pass Throughs
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Band Row Rotate Press
Banded Lat Stretch
10 Worlds Greatest Stretch
5e/s Squat Knee Taps
10m Walking Lunge 22.5/15
10 Broad Jump
2 rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Muscle Clean
3 Clean Pull
3 Hang Power Clean
3 Tall Clean
3 Full Clean
3 Split Jerk
If catching up, talk to the coach for a warm up relevant to your movement

strength.name: Clean and Jerk
strength.description:
1x1 | Clean does not need to hit depth. This does not mean Power Clean as high as you can. Still get low! | BUILD 6 Sets E3MOM
00:00 3 @ 50%
03:00 3 @ 60%
06:00 3 @ 70%
09:00 2 @ 80%
12:00 1 @ 90%
15:00 1 @ 95%
18:00-28:00 1RM Attempts

metcon.name: Jackie
metcon.description:
For time:
1,000-meter row
50 thrusters
30 pull-ups

Men: 45 lb.
Women: 35 lb.

hypertrophy.reasoning: Balance posterior chain and rowing mechanics while sparing upper body and legs already taxed by clean/jerk and metcon.

raw_text:
Warm-up | Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Pass Throughs

1RM Catch Up | Missed a day? Want to retest something that could have gone further? Today is the day! Happy with everything so far? Test your Clean & Jerk today.
Clean and Jerk | 1x1 | Clean does not need to hit depth. This does not mean Power Clean as high as you can. Still get low! | BUILD 6 Sets E3MOM

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Clean and Jerk, 1 by 1 at 95 percent. Metcon: Jackie. For Time: 1,000-meter row, 50 thrusters, 30 pull-ups. For hypertrophy, focus on hamstrings, rear delts, back (lats/rhomboids).
